name: Birdie Box
about: Birdie Box is an indoor golf simulator and clubhouse in Cullman, Alabama, offering access to over 20,000 Garmin courses with real-time stats and premium technology. The facility features simulator bays, a clubhouse with food and drinks, and options for public play, memberships with 24/7 access, and group events. It is designed for casual play, practice, and social gatherings, catering to both golf enthusiasts and those looking for a relaxed indoor experience.
why_golfers_like_it: 20,000+ Garmin courses including famous locations like Augusta National
Premium Garmin Approach R50 simulator with radar technology tracking over 20 data metrics
Clubhouse atmosphere with food, drinks, and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Cold beer and refreshing seltzers available

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading golf simulator with tour-level accuracy and performance

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverages, but it does not explicitly mention a BYOB policy. Contact Birdie Box for details on outside food and drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes, but league nights play 9-hole competitions. Contact the venue for estimated play times.

faq.question: Is Birdie Box kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Birdie Box is kid-friendly and welcomes families. It offers activities and events suitable for all ages, including juniors and youth.
